narrative:
Precinct Tully (precinct in Van Wert County) has 717 registered voters, with 56.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.8 percentage points.
